column13: Description
Epic for the attachment domain migration to the plm-product DGS.

**Current Behaviour:** green-field; schema translated from `code/schemas/SPARK_Attachment.txt`.
**Target:** federation v2.3 header, `scalar DateTime ‚Üí Instant`, empty `extend type Query`/`Mutation`. **Acceptance:** 1. `generateJava` passes. 2. scalar round-trips. **Tests:** ‚òê compiles ‚òê serde.

column3: SPARK-ATCH-A02 ¬∑ Owned types + inputs (normalize snake/camel record shape)
column13: **Target:** `Attachment` (`@key(fields:"id")`) + ~9 value types + ~12 inputs per [03-schema.graphql](./03-schema.graphql). **Key task:** normalize the **dual record shape** (elastic `snake_case` vs api `camelCase`) at the DTO/Feign boundary (Jackson) so the schema fields are clean ‚Äî this removes most of the field-resolver coalescing. **Acceptance:** 1. all types/inputs present; nullability matches SDL. 2. one canonical DTO maps both shapes. **Tests:** ‚òê validates ‚òê snake+camel mapping.

**Target:** `@extends @external` stubs for `SearchAttachment`, `UserProfileAttributes`, `Tag`,
`AccessControl`, `ResourceMapping`/`SingleResourceMapping`, `VMM_BusinessPartner`. **Acceptance:** 1. compiles; gateway composes. **Tests:** ‚òê compiles ‚òê stub resolves.

**Current Behaviour (Phase 2 ¬ßService):** ~30 REST methods on `plm-attachment` (`attachments/v3` + renders/gallery/acl). **Target:** Kotlin service; canonical DTO; preserve the V3-vs-legacy gallery branch. **Acceptance:** 1. methods present (V3 reads/byPost, renders, archive/delete, copy, associate/remove, tags, attributes/bulk(V2), gallery publish/unpublish V3+legacy, teams). **Tests:** ‚òê endpoint build ‚òê gallery branch.

---

### Phase B ‚Äî Core Reads

**Current Behaviour (Q1):** empty ids ‚Üí []; (ACL) token ‚Üí (own) `GET /attachments/v3?humanIds=`. **Target:** `@DgsQuery ‚Üí [Attachment]`. **Acceptance:** 1. returns attachments; empty ids ‚Üí []. **Tests:** ‚òê happy ‚òê empty.

**Current Behaviour (Q2):** (üü° relationship) `searchByIds({id, includeNodeTypes:['attachments','attachments_v3'], maxDepth:0})` ‚Üí ids ‚Üí (accessControl) `getUserAccessByPost` ‚Üí (own) `getAttachmentsByPostV3`. **Target:** `@DgsQuery ‚Üí [Attachment]`. **Acceptance:** 1. relationship‚Üíids‚Üíattachments chain. **Tests:** ‚òê chain ‚òê empty.

**Current Behaviour (Q3):** (üü° relationship) ids ‚Üí (own) `getAttachmentsByIdsAndAuthorByPostV3`. **Target:** `@DgsQuery ‚Üí [Attachment]`. **Acceptance:** 1. returns attachments incl. author. **Tests:** ‚òê chain.

**Covers:** `getRendersForAttachmentIds` (@deprecated), `getRendersForAttachmentV3Ids`, `getRendersForAttachmentIdsByPost`. **Current Behaviour:** map each id ‚Üí (own) renders loader (betaMode), compact; byPost uses an ACL token. **Target:** `@DgsQuery ‚Üí [GalleryAttachment]`. **Acceptance:** 1. each variant returns renders; betaMode honored. **Tests:** ‚òê ids ‚òê v3 ‚òê byPost.

**Covers:** `getAttachmentsfromRelatedResource` (parent+related or related-only), `getAttachmentsfromRelatedResources`. **Current Behaviour:** (üî¥ search) `searchAttachmentsByParentAndRelatedResource` / `‚Ä¶ByRelatedResource(s)` ‚Üí content or []. **Target:** `@DgsQuery ‚Üí [SearchAttachment]`. **Acceptance:** 1. parent+related vs related-only branches. **Tests:** ‚òê both branches ‚òê empty.

---

### Phase D ‚Äî Mutations
**Current Behaviour (M1):** (ACL) token ‚Üí (own) `archiveAttachmentV3(id)`. **Target:** `@DgsMutation ‚Üí Attachment`. **Acceptance:** 1. archives. **Tests:** ‚òê archive.
**Current Behaviour (M2):** (ACL) token ‚Üí (own) `deleteAttachmentV3(humanId)` ‚Üí String. **Target:** `@DgsMutation ‚Üí String`. **Acceptance:** 1. deletes; returns status. **Tests:** ‚òê delete.

**Current Behaviour (M3):** (ACL) token for `humanIds` ‚Üí (own) `copyAttachmentsV3`. **Target:** `@DgsMutation ‚Üí CopyAttachment`. **Acceptance:** 1. copies; returns thumbnail + copies. **Tests:** ‚òê copy.
**Current Behaviour (M4):** (ACL) token ‚Üí (own) `associateResourcesV3`. **Target:** `@DgsMutation ‚Üí [Attachment]`. **Acceptance:** 1. associates resources. **Tests:** ‚òê associate.
**Current Behaviour (M5):** (ACL) token ‚Üí (own) `removeResourcesV3`. **Target:** `@DgsMutation ‚Üí [Attachment]`. **Acceptance:** 1. removes resources. **Tests:** ‚òê remove.

**Current Behaviour (M6):** build bulk `{resourceId, dps:[{permissionLevel:ADMIN/READ, grantees:[partnerId]}]}` for admin/read id lists ‚Üí (accessControl) `updateAccessControl`. **Note:** this is an **ACL write** (grant data ‚Äî build work). **Target:** `@DgsMutation ‚Üí AccessControl`. **Acceptance:** 1. ADMIN/READ DTOs built correctly per id list. **Tests:** ‚òê admin ‚òê read ‚òê both.

**Current Behaviour (M7/M8):** **identical impl** ‚Äî (ACL) token ‚Üí (own) `updateTagsV3({attachmentId, tags})`. **Target:** `@DgsMutation` (one impl, two schema fields). **Acceptance:** 1. updates tags; both fields delegate. **Tests:** ‚òê tags ‚òê both fields.

**Current Behaviour (M9):** if tags ‚Üí (own) `bulkUpdateTags`; if permissions ‚Üí (accessControl) `bulkUpdateAttachmentPermissions`. **Latent:** fire-and-forget; **returns undefined** (confirm contract). **Target:** `@DgsMutation`; await + return updated. **Acceptance:** 1. tags + permissions applied. 2. returns updated attachments (fix the undefined). **Tests:** ‚òê tags ‚òê permissions ‚òê return.
**Current Behaviour (M10):** (ACL) token for `documentId` ‚Üí (own) `updateAttributes`. **Target:** `@DgsMutation ‚Üí Attachment`. **Acceptance:** 1. updates attributes. **Tests:** ‚òê update.

**Current Behaviour (M11):** (ACL) token for `documentId||humanId` ‚Üí (own) `bulkUpdateAttributes`. **Target:** `@DgsMutation ‚Üí [Attachment]`. **Acceptance:** 1. bulk-updates attributes. **Tests:** ‚òê bulk.

**Current Behaviour (M12):** (ACL) token for `documentId` ‚Üí (own) `bulkUpdateAttachmentsV2({attachments})`. **Target:** `@DgsMutation ‚Üí [Attachment]`. **Acceptance:** 1. bulk-updates (tags/packet/perms/related). **Tests:** ‚òê bulk v2.

**Current Behaviour (M13):** **branch on `ATC-` prefix** ‚Üí V3 (`publishAttachmentToGalleryV3`) or legacy (`publishAttachmentToGallery`); api returns void ‚Üí return `true`. **Target:** `@DgsMutation ‚Üí Boolean`. **Acceptance:** 1. ATC- ‚Üí V3, else legacy. 2. returns true on no-error. **Tests:** ‚òê v3 ‚òê legacy.
**Current Behaviour (M14):** as D12, unpublish (V3/legacy by `ATC-`). **Target:** `@DgsMutation ‚Üí Boolean`. **Acceptance:** 1. ATC- ‚Üí V3, else legacy. **Tests:** ‚òê v3 ‚òê legacy.

**Current Behaviour (M15):** build `{teamsToUpdateDto, parentId, humanIds:files, relatedResourceIds}` ‚Üí (ACL) token for `files` ‚Üí (own) `associateAttachmentTeams`. **Target:** `@DgsMutation ‚Üí [Attachment]`. **Acceptance:** 1. associates teams to files. **Tests:** ‚òê associate teams.

---

### Phase F ‚Äî Federation & decisions

**Target:** `@DgsEntityFetcher(name="Attachment")` resolving by `id`, so product (`attachments`,
`attachmentsWithMetaData`, copy flows), productDetails, packaging, workspace, sample, claims resolve
attachments over the gateway. Keep `Attachment` distinct from search's `SearchAttachment`. **Acceptance:** 1. entity resolves by key. 2. `Product { attachments { id } }` smoke test. **Tests:** ‚òê entity fetch ‚òê smoke.

column3: SPARK-ATCH-F02 ¬∑ Deferred getAttachments drift query decision
column13:
**Current Behaviour:** `getAttachments(resourceId, resourceType)` is `@deprecated("Use v3")` with **no resolver**. **Target:** delete or keep `@deprecated`; survey consumers. **Acceptance:** 1. decision + traffic survey. **Tests:** ‚òê schema diff intentional.

---

### Phase G ‚Äî Field Resolvers & Tests

column3: SPARK-ATCH-G01 ¬∑ Attachment core field resolvers (snake/camel + access/users/businessPartnersFull)
column13:
**Current Behaviour:** ~18 coalescing fields (snake/camel) + Date parse + `id` derivation; `access`
(accessControl `getPermissionsForResource`), `businessPartnersFull` (üîµ vmm), `createdBy`/`updatedBy`
(üü° user). **Target:** most coalescing handled by A02's canonical DTO; thin `@DgsData` for the EXT fields. **Acceptance:** 1. coalescing correct (both shapes). 2. access/users/bps resolve. **Tests:** ‚òê snake shape ‚òê camel shape ‚òê access ‚òê users.

**Current Behaviour:** `tags` (üü° tag `getTags`), `modelFile` (`get3DmodelFile`); `GalleryDetails.publishedBy`
(üü° user)/`fileTypes` (üîµ gallery `getAssetFiles`) + coalescing; `GalleryFile.canOpenInShowDog`, `ThreeDFile`,
`ProductPacketProps` (coalesce). **Acceptance:** 1. each resolves; gallery fileTypes via asset id. **Tests:** ‚òê tags ‚òê modelFile ‚òê galleryDetails.

**Target:** ‚â•80% unit coverage; parity harness (incl. **both record shapes**, the gallery V3/legacy branch,
ACL writes, bulk updates); contract test (schema diff intentional-only, incl. `@deprecated`). **Acceptance:** 1. unit ‚â•80%. 2. parity green (both shapes). 3. schema-diff intentional. **Tests:** ‚òê parity ‚òê contract.

---

## 4. Risk Register
| Risk | Likelihood | Impact | Mitigation | Owner |
|------|-----------|--------|------------|-------|
| Dual record shape leaks into schema (A02/G01) | Medium | Medium | Normalize at the DTO boundary; one mapping | Backend Eng |
| `bulkUpdateAttachments` fire-and-forget / undefined (D08) | Medium | Medium | Await + return updated; confirm contract | Backend Eng |
| ACL-permission writes treated as "ignored" (D06/D08) | Medium | Medium | They ARE build work (grant data) ‚Äî port them | Tech Lead |
| Gallery publish/unpublish V3-vs-legacy branch (D12/D13) | Low | Low | Preserve the `ATC-` prefix branch | Backend Eng |
| `SearchAttachment` vs `Attachment` confusion in supergraph | Low | Medium | Keep the two types distinct | Architect |

## 5. Summary
- **Stories:** 28 (A:4 ¬∑ B:5 ¬∑ D:14 ¬∑ F:2 ¬∑ G:3).
- **Critical path:** A01‚ÜíA02/A04‚ÜíG01‚ÜíG03.
- **Highest cost:** the dual-shape normalization (A02) + core field resolvers (G01).
- **Separate subgraph:** `Attachment` is the entity product/productDetails/packaging/workspace/sample/claims reference.

---
**Phase Completed:** Phase 4 ‚Äî Migration Stories ¬∑ **Domain:** `attachment` ¬∑ **Outputs:** 04-stories.md, 04-stories-index.yaml, 04-po-summary.md.
